columns.name: Title
values: Phishing email delivered with malicious attachment
Cobalt Strike beacon identified on endpoint
Data exfiltration attempt via DNS tunneling
Brute force attack against VPN gateway

columns.name: Description
values: Ransomware activity was detected encrypting files across the endpoint.
Mimikatz was used to dump credentials from LSASS on domain controller.
Lateral movement using PsExec and stolen domain admin credentials.
Multi-stage PowerShell attack chain downloading and executing payloads.
User received phishing email with macro-enabled document payload.
C2 beacon communicating with external infrastructure on port 443.
New admin user created via net.exe by compromised service account.
Large volume of DNS queries to suspicious domain consistent with tunneling.
Repeated failed VPN login attempts from external IP addresses.
Third-party software update package contained trojanized DLL.
